events.title: I-39/90/94 Virtual Public Hearing
events.description: The Wisconsin Department of Transportation (WisDOT) held three public hearings — one virtual and two in-person — to update the study's Draft Environmental Impact Statement, preferred alternative, and corridor improvements for the I-39/90/94 corridor.
events.details: Instructions for submitting verbal and written testimony were provided. The virtual public hearing began at 5 p.m. and ended when all interested persons had provided testimony or 7 p.m., whichever occurred first.

events.title: I-39/90/94 In-Person Public Hearing

location.name: Madison College Truax Building — Conference Room D1630

events.description: An in-person public hearing for the I-39/90/94 Corridor Study, providing updates on the Draft Environmental Impact Statement, recommended preferred alternative, and corridor improvements.
events.details: The same information was shared at all three hearings. Instructions for presenting verbal and written testimony were provided at the hearing.
